import io
import string

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  if string.is_empty(trimmed)
    println("")
    Ok(())
  else
    let parts = string.split_whitespace(trimmed)
    mut nums: List<Int> = []
    mut i = 0
    while i < parts.len()
      let part = match parts.get(i)
      when Some(s)
        s
      when None
        ""
      end
      let n = match string.parse_int(part)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      nums = list.push(nums, n)
      i = i + 1
    end
    mut result: List<Int> = []
    mut cur_max = match nums.get(0)
    when Some(v)
      v
    when None
      0
    end
    mut j = 0
    while j < nums.len()
      let val = match nums.get(j)
      when Some(v)
        v
      when None
        0
      end
      if val > cur_max
        cur_max = val
      end
      result = list.push(result, cur_max)
      j = j + 1
    end
    mut out = ""
    mut k = 0
    while k < result.len()
      let v = match result.get(k)
      when Some(x)
        x
      when None
        0
      end
      if k == 0
        out = "#{v}"
      else
        out = "#{out} #{v}"
      end
      k = k + 1
    end
    println(out)
    Ok(())
  end
end
